1 Identity Verification

Government-backed ID
check in under 2 minutes.

Applicants upload their driving licence or passport. Our automated API integration with GOV.UK's identity verification service confirms the document's authenticity against government records in real time â€” no manual human review permitted. Fake IDs are rejected automatically.

3 Background Screening

Enhanced criminal record check.
Results in 24 hours.

All applicants are screened by our accredited background check partners â€” equivalent in scope to an enhanced DBS check. Any finding relevant to working in people's homes â€” theft, fraud, assault, sexual offences â€” results in immediate rejection. Results are kept confidential.

Enhanced DBS-equivalent
Wider scope than a standard DBS â€” specifically designed for work in private homes.
Under 24 hours
uCheck & First Advantage screening â€” results returned the same working day in most cases.
Confidential handling
Results are never shared with homeowners â€” only the pass/fail outcome is disclosed.

The Full Safety Standard

Six checks every vendor
must pass â€” no exceptions.

No shortcuts. No self-declaration. Every check is independently verified against a trusted source â€” government databases, FCA registers, trade bodies, and background screening providers.

Government ID Verification

Every applicant submits a valid UK driving licence or passport, verified against the DVLA and GOV.UK identity API in real time. Not human-reviewed. Catfishing is eliminated at entry.

Verified via GOV.UK API Â· Under 2 minutes
Public Liability Insurance

Minimum ÂŁ1M PLI required. Certificate upload triggers automated expiry extraction. Insurance validity is confirmed and monitored continuously â€” lapse means suspension.

Auto-monitored Â· Expiry tracked
Trade Accreditation

Gas Safe, NICEIC, NAPIT, APHC, FMB â€” all verified via the issuing body's own API. Not a badge upload. A live check against the official register, re-run every 90 days.

Live API Â· Re-verified every 90 days
Trade Knowledge Quiz

20-question assessment tailored to the declared trade â€” safety regulations, Building Regs, relevant legislation. Approximately 30% fail. Failed applicants cannot reapply for 90 days.

~30% rejection rate Â· 90-day cooldown on fail
Enhanced Background Screening

Enhanced DBS-equivalent check via uCheck / First Advantage. Results within 24 hours. Any relevant criminal finding â€” theft, fraud, assault, sexual offences â€” = immediate rejection.

Enhanced DBS-equivalent Â· Under 24hrs

Only issued once all five checks pass. Displayed on every profile, every proposal, every search result. The badge is not for sale. It cannot be purchased, faked, or transferred. Revoked on any compliance breach.

The Vetting Process

What every applicant
goes through before they're live.

The application process is deliberately rigorous. Each stage must pass before the next opens. Approximately 30% of applicants are rejected â€” mostly at Stage 4 (trade quiz) and Stage 5 (background check).

Only verified tradespeople receive leads
01
Online Application
Trade profile & category declaration

The tradesperson completes a structured online application declaring their trade categories, years of experience, working regions, and business type. Declaration of any relevant criminal convictions is mandatory at this stage.

Trade categories Region coverage Business structure Conviction declaration
02
Identity Verification
Government-backed ID check in under 2 minutes

Applicants upload their driving licence or passport. Our automated API integration with GOV.UK's identity verification service confirms the document's authenticity against government records in real time. Fake IDs are rejected automatically.

DVLA driving licence Passport verification Live API Â· No manual review Result in <2 minutes
03
Insurance & Accreditations
Public liability + trade body verification

Certificate upload triggers automated expiry extraction. Insurance validity is confirmed and scheduled for ongoing monitoring. For regulated trades, accreditation is verified directly against the register of the issuing body via their public APIs or partner integrations.

Min. ÂŁ1M PLI required Gas Safe register API NICEIC / NAPIT check Expiry auto-monitored
04
Trade Knowledge Quiz
20-question assessment â€” no retakes on failure

The quiz is tailored to the declared trade category and tests practical knowledge: safety regulations, correct procedures, relevant legislation (Building Regs, Part P, Gas Safety Regulations). Approximately 30% of applicants fail. Failed applicants cannot reapply for 90 days.

20 trade-specific questions Safety & legislation focus ~30% rejection rate 90-day cooldown on fail
05
Background Screening
Enhanced criminal record check within 24 hours

All applicants are screened by our accredited background check partners, equivalent in scope to an enhanced DBS check. Any finding relevant to working in people's homes â€” theft, fraud, assault, sexual offences â€” results in immediate rejection.

uCheck / First Advantage Enhanced DBS-equivalent Results in under 24hrs Confidential handling
06
Verified Badge Issued
TradeMatch Verified â€” visible on every profile and proposal

Once all checks pass, the tradesperson is issued their TradeMatch Verified badge. This badge appears on their profile, every proposal they submit, and the physical van sticker we send to all verified tradespeople. The badge is not for sale. It cannot be purchased or faked.

Profile, proposals & search Physical van sticker issued Not purchasable or paid Revoked on any compliance breach
Ongoing Monitoring

Verification doesn't
stop at onboarding.

Becoming TradeMatch Verified is not a one-time event. Every credential we verify is continuously re-checked on a scheduled cycle. A single lapse revokes access automatically.

Insurance expiry monitoring
All insurance certificates are tracked by expiry date. Vendors receive reminders at 30 and 7 days. Lapse = account suspended within 24 hours. No manual override.
Trade accreditation re-checks
Gas Safe, NICEIC, and NAPIT registrations are re-verified against official registers every 90 days â€” automatically, not on the tradesperson's say-so.
Tamper-proof review system
Reviews are unlocked only when both parties mark a job complete. They publish immediately. Vendors can respond publicly but cannot delete or suppress any review.
48-hour dispute resolution SLA
Every dispute is handled by a human arbitration team with a binding 48-hour resolution SLA. Escrow funds are frozen during any open dispute.
~30%
Of applicants rejected
before receiving any lead
The Rejection Rate

We say no
so you don't have to.

A 30% rejection rate is not a failure of the platform â€” it's the point of it. Checkatrade, MyBuilder, and Bark accept almost everyone who applies. TradeMatch doesn't.

  • Most rejections happen at Stage 4 â€” the trade knowledge quiz. It is deliberately hard. Guessing does not work.
  • Stage 5 background screening removes applicants with relevant criminal history. This is non-negotiable and non-appealable.
  • Rejected applicants are permanently barred from reapplying in the same trade category. The 90-day cooldown applies only to partial failures.
  • No refunds are offered for failed applications. The cost of the check is the cost of maintaining safety standards.
Post a Job â€” It's Free
Common Questions

Safety questions
answered honestly.

Is TradeMatch's vetting better than Checkatrade?
Checkatrade's vetting has been criticised for being slow, inconsistent, and â€” according to Which? and BBC Watchdog investigations â€” bypassed in some cases. TradeMatch uses automated API checks against government and trade body databases for every applicant. There is no human reviewer who can be fooled or pressured. The rejection rate (~30%) is higher than any comparable platform and is by design.
What happens if a tradesperson damages my home?
All verified tradespeople carry minimum ÂŁ1 million public liability insurance â€” a condition of their TradeMatch Verified badge. If damage occurs, this insurance covers it. Additionally, any disputed escrow payment can be frozen while the matter is investigated. Our 48-hour arbitration team can also recommend the correct claims process and assist with evidence gathering.
Can I lose my deposit on TradeMatch?
No. Deposits and milestone payments are held in FCA-regulated escrow via Stripe Connect. No tradesperson receives any payment until you digitally sign off each milestone. If you're unhappy with a stage, you raise a dispute and the funds remain frozen until the arbitration team resolves the matter. TradeMatch has structural protections â€” not just a customer service promise.
How do I know if a tradesperson's Gas Safe card is real?
We verify Gas Safe registration directly against the Gas Safe Register's own API at onboarding â€” and re-check every 90 days. The registration number displayed on their TradeMatch profile is the real number from the Gas Safe register. You can verify it independently at gassaferegister.co.uk. The number on their card and on their profile will match.
What if I disagree with the dispute outcome?
Our 48-hour dispute resolution is designed to be binding, based on photo evidence, communications, and milestone scope documented within the platform. If a homeowner believes a decision was materially wrong, they can request a secondary review within 5 working days. Both parties retain their standard UK legal rights â€” TradeMatch's arbitration does not waive these.
Can a tradesperson pay to remove a bad review?
No. Reviews are tamper-proof and job-linked: they only unlock once both parties mark a job complete, and they publish immediately. Vendors can respond publicly to reviews, but they cannot delete, suppress, or challenge a review except through the formal dispute process. The Reliability Index is calculated entirely from objective platform data and cannot be purchased or manipulated.
What if a tradesperson's insurance lapses mid-job?
We monitor all insurance expiry dates. If a policy lapses, the tradesperson is suspended from receiving new leads within 24 hours and a notification is sent to any homeowners with active jobs. Existing escrow-protected jobs continue â€” the homeowner is not left mid-project â€” but the vendor must upload renewal documentation before accepting any new work.
How is TradeMatch different from RatedPeople or Bark?
Bark has a documented history of fake and ghost leads â€” credits purchased that result in no real homeowner. RatedPeople uses a dual-fee model (monthly subscription plus per-lead cost) with limited trade coverage. Neither platform offers payment protection, background screening equivalent to a DBS check, or ongoing insurance monitoring. TradeMatch does all three, plus limits quotes to 5 per job instead of 10+, and verifies accreditations via official APIs.
The Bottom Line

Protection isn't a feature.
It's the entire point.

Every other platform is built for volume. TradeMatch is built for trust. Post your job free â€” and let the platform do the work of making sure every quote you receive comes from someone worth hiring.
